title: Vestian is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Vestian is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!
